sections.paragraph:
Original: מדרשׁ

Transliteration: midrâsh

Phonetic: mid-rawsh'

BDB Definition:

  1. study, exposition, midrash, record, story
    1. writings of a didactic nature
    2. midrash - transliteration of the Hebrew word

Origin: from H1875

TWOT entry: 455a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
